reason: Removing gssproxy may also remove packages that depend on it, potentially breaking Kerberos/GSSAPI authentication services and causing SSH or console login failures. The risk of losing authentication capability warrants human review before remediation.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; potential removal of dependent packages; disruption of Kerberos/GSSAPI authentication; possible SSH login failure; impact on services relying on gssproxy (e.g., SSSD, sssd-krb5)
